parameters.query: SELECT id, name, file, slot, tier, manufacturer, uex_category_name, uex_category_section, slug FROM datap4k_armor_norm WHERE slug IS NOT NULL AND slug != '' ORDER BY uex_category_section, uex_category_name, name;

SELECT an.id, an.raw_id, an.file, an.name, an.slug, an.slot, an.tier, an.manufacturer, an.micro_scu, an.container_scu, an.temp_min_c, an.temp_max_c, an.rad_capacity, an.rad_diss_rate, an.dmg_res_physical, an.dmg_res_energy, an.dmg_res_distortion, an.dmg_res_biochemical, an.dmg_res_stun, an.dmg_res_force, an.dmg_res_thermal, an.sig_ir_emission, an.sig_ir_reduce_abs, an.sig_em_emission, an.sig_em_reduce_abs, an.uex_id, an.uex_category_name, an.uex_category_section, COALESCE((  SELECT jsonb_agg(jsonb_build_object('terminal',t.name,'buy',p.buy_price,'sell',p.sell_price) ORDER BY t.name)   FROM prices p JOIN trade_terminals t ON t.id=p.terminal_id   WHERE p.item_external_id=an.uex_id AND an.uex_id IS NOT NULL     AND GREATEST(COALESCE(p.buy_price,0),COALESCE(p.sell_price,0))>0 AND p.asset_type='item'), '[]'::jsonb) AS uex_prices, COALESCE((  SELECT jsonb_agg(jsonb_build_object('shop',si.shop,'location',si.location,'buy',si.buy_auec,'sell',si.sell_auec) ORDER BY si.shop)   FROM datap4k_shop_inventory si   WHERE si.item_raw_id=an.raw_id AND si.item_raw_table='datap4k_armor_raw'     AND GREATEST(COALESCE(si.buy_auec,0),COALESCE(si.sell_auec,0))>0), '[]'::jsonb) AS datap4k_prices FROM datap4k_armor_norm an WHERE an.id={{$json["id"]}};

INSERT INTO kb_content (entity_slug, entity_type, entity_id, content, source_workflow, generated_at, updated_at) VALUES ('{{$json["entity_slug"]}}', 'armor', NULL, '{{$json["content"].replace(/'/g, "''")}}', '{{$json["source_workflow"]}}', now(), now()) ON CONFLICT (entity_slug, entity_type) DO UPDATE SET content=EXCLUDED.content, updated_at=now();
